channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: New Momentum, Old Problems: Transatlantic Export Control Considerations
item.description: The newly introduced MATCH Act seeks to close gaps in U.S. export restrictions by limiting China's access to advanced chipmaking tools through non-U.S. suppliers—but its reach into European supply chains raises serious questions for the transatlantic relationship.
